JABVOX_KANBAN.TITLE: Kanban
JABVOX_KANBAN.MOVE_ERROR: Failed to move conversation. Please try again.
JABVOX_KANBAN.SEND_MESSAGE_ERROR: Failed to send message. Please try again.
JABVOX_KANBAN.NOTE_PLACEHOLDER: Add a private note... (Enter to send)

FUNNELS.TITLE: Kanban Funnels
FUNNELS.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage funnels to organize your leads in Kanban boards.
FUNNELS.EMPTY: No funnels yet. Create your first funnel to get started.
FUNNELS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete the funnel "{name}"? All stage assignments will be removed.

FORM.DESCRIPTION: Configure the funnel name, inboxes, and stages.
FORM.INBOXES_HINT: New conversations from selected inboxes will automatically appear in the first stage.
FORM.CAMPAIGNS_HINT: Contacts whose lead belongs to a selected campaign will be placed in the first stage.
FORM.AFFILIATES_HINT: Contacts whose lead belongs to a selected affiliate will be placed in the first stage.
FORM.ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.

STAGES.TITLE: Stages — {funnel}
STAGES.DESCRIPTION: Define the stages (columns) of this funnel. Drag to reorder.
STAGES.EMPTY: No stages yet. Add your first stage.
STAGES.CANNOT_DELETE_LAST: Cannot delete the last stage in a funnel.
STAGES.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete stage "{name}"? Conversations in this stage will be moved to the first stage.
